nasb.text: I will also destroy all its cattle from beside many waters; And the foot of man will not muddy them anymore And the hoofs of beasts will not muddy them.

esv.text: I will destroy all its beasts from beside many waters; and no foot of man shall trouble them anymore, nor shall the hoofs of beasts trouble them.

cnv.text: 我必從眾水的旁邊，除滅埃及所有的牲畜；人的腳必不再攪濁這些水，牲畜的蹄也不這樣作。

ccb.text: 我要杀尽她河边的牲畜， 使人足兽蹄不再搅浑河水。
